calendar.matters:
Petition To Find That Assets Are Property Of Trust
Off Calendar Apr-07-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Maureen McFadden for Margaret Dillon (Petitioner).

Ms. McFadden stated that she spoke with her Client, that her Client stated that the San Francisco Credit Union account has a balance of $6,200.00 and was owned by her Parents when they established their Trust, and that the IRA account has $32,000.00. The Court stated that there is no general assignment and that there is no problem with probating them. Ms. McFadden stated that the cost of probate would be substantial. The Petition to Find that Assets Are Property of Trust is granted in part as to those assets that are listed on the schedule as assets of the Trust and denied in part as those assets that were not listed. The Court will modify the proposed order.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: A. Jaime. Not reported.
